prerequisites: A Finnhub account. Register a free account at finnhub.io to obtain API access.
A Finnhub API key, found in your Finnhub dashboard after registering, supplied to the api_key field.
The exchange code whose stock symbols you want to sync (for example US), supplied to the exchange field.
A market_news_category value, one of: general, forex, crypto, merger.
One or more stock symbols to sync, supplied to the symbols field, plus a start_date_2 marking the earliest date from which to pull historical data.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Finnhub uses a single API key for authentication. Every GET request requires the key, passed either as the token query parameter (token=apiKey) in the URL or as the X-Finnhub-Token HTTP header. The connector collects this key in the api_key secret field; you find it in your Finnhub dashboard after registering.

setupSteps.title: Register a Finnhub account
setupSteps.body: Sign up for a free account at finnhub.io/register. Finnhub offers a free tier; review finnhub.io/pricing for rate limits and the endpoints available on your plan.

setupSteps.title: Copy your API key
setupSteps.body: Open your Finnhub dashboard once logged in and copy the API key shown there. Finnhub authenticates every request with this key. Paste it into the connector's api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Set the exchange and symbols
setupSteps.body: Set the exchange field to the exchange code for the market you want (for example US). List the stock tickers to sync in the symbols field.

setupSteps.title: Choose a market news category and start date
setupSteps.body: Set market_news_category to one of the supported values: general, forex, crypto, or merger. Set start_date_2 to the earliest date from which the connector should pull historical data.

sources.title: Finnhub market news endpoint (categories: general, forex, crypto, merger)
